pillar_metadata.name: Presence
pillar_metadata.description: The degree to which an entity is perceived and impactful in a system.

visibility_check.impact: Determines which entities are prioritized for processing and response.

scale_interaction.impact: Presence controls the influence of scale within the organizational structure.

invisibility.result: Neglect; the unit's state and needs are ignored by the system.

presence_domination.result: Signal override; loud but inaccurate units dominate system attention.
